text: Washing is a vital step in keeping your car looking its absolute best.
And by using the wrong product or technique, you can easily remove your wax protection or possibly create swirls.
Before washing, make sure your car is in the shade and the surface is cool to the touch.
When washing your car, never use household detergents as they can strip wax protection and promote oxidation.
Always use a premium car wash like Meguiar's Ultimate Wash & Wax.
Begin by mixing your wash solution in a clean bucket using the proper dilution.
Now, fill a second clean bucket with plain water.
Before washing, make sure your car is in the shade and the surface is cool to the touch.
Before washing, make sure your car is in the shade and the surface is cool to the touch.
Before washing, rinse the entire vehicle to remove any loose debris.
Using our microfiber wash mitt, begin washing and rinsing one section at a time, working from the top down.
Keep your wash mitt clean by rinsing it often in the bucket of plain water.
Then, retrieve fresh suds.
Once you've washed and rinsed the entire car, it's time for a final rinse.
This is done by removing the nozzle and allowing the water to flow across all surfaces, causing the water to run off, leaving you less water to dry.
Dry any remaining water using Meguiar's Water Magnet Microfiber Drying Tap.
And don't forget the door jib!
Use a clean cloth to wipe off any remaining water.
Use a clean cloth to wipe off any remaining water.
And don't forget the door jib!
Use a clean cloth to wipe off any remaining water.
Remember, washing weekly using the right products and technique will ensure your car is free of contaminants and looks its best all the time.
